    feat(timeline): add edge-drag resize for bar background width
    
    Closes #475
    
    Move the timeline bar's visual background to a ::before pseudo-element
    so it can narrow independently while dots remain at full 24px layout.

    creating a 糖葫芦 (candied haws) effect at minimum width.

input.description: CSS changes in the timeline PR

content.text: Now I see the issue. The `::before` pseudo-element narrows visually, but the parent `.gemini-timeline-bar` container still has full 24px width and blocks pointer events on the area behind it. Let me look at the current state.
Let me check how the edge-drag resize is implemented in the manager.
Let me look at the track/dot structure to understand what needs pointer events.
Let me check the slider elements too.

Now I have a clear picture. The fix is straightforward: the `.gemini-timeline-bar` is always 24px wide but the `::before` visual background can be narrower. We need `pointer-events: none` on the bar itself, `pointer-events: auto` on `::before` (the visible background), and `pointer-events: auto` on `.timeline-dot` (so dots remain clickable).

Let me also check for any other interactive elements inside the bar.

content.content:
559:.timeline-runner-ring {

[Showing results with pagination = limit: 20, offset: 0]

content.text: Good. The runner ring is just a visual element, not interactive. Now let me apply the fix.

content.content: The file /Users/jessezhang/Desktop/Coding/side-projects/gemini-voyager/public/contentStyle.css has been updated successfully.

lines: /* Visual background layer — width adjustable via edge drag, dots unaffected */
/* Disable transitions during active resize for immediate feedback */

content.text: Now add `pointer-events: auto` to `.timeline-dot` so dots remain clickable even when they extend beyond the background.

content.content: The file /Users/jessezhang/Desktop/Coding/side-projects/gemini-voyager/public/contentStyle.css has been updated successfully.

content.text:
Build passes. Here's what I changed:

1. **`.gemini-timeline-bar`** — added `pointer-events: none` so the 24px-wide bar container no longer blocks clicks/hover on content behind it
2. **`.gemini-timeline-bar::before`** — changed from `pointer-events: none` to `pointer-events: auto` so the visible background (which follows `--timeline-bar-width`) still captures events for edge-drag resize and cursor management
3. **`.timeline-dot`** — added `pointer-events: auto` so dots remain clickable even when they extend beyond the narrowed background (糖葫芦 effect)

This way, only the visible background area and the dots block interaction — the empty space between the narrowed background edge and the 24px container edge passes events through to the page underneath.
